response.justification: The candidate does not meet the foundational technical requirements for this role. The 8-year C++ minimum is the most critical gap: the resume shows at most 6 months of C++ work at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, with C++ absent from the skills section entirely. Cloud compute platform architecture and large-scale infrastructure leadership are similarly absent — cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK usage at one employer. While Bogdan demonstrates broad full-stack competence, solid engineering practices, and some high-throughput distributed systems experience, none of it aligns with the depth and specialization this role demands.
strengths: Consistent software craftsmanship culture across roles: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and pairing are recurring practices
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using asynchronous I/O and low-latency techniques
Community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects suggests mentorship capability and knowledge-sharing disposition
concerns: C++ experience is effectively absent — the 8-year minimum requirement is unmet and C++ does not appear in the skills section
No cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership; the deepest cloud exposure is AWS CDK in a pricing-team context at Optilyz

No verifiable formal technical lead ownership: staff titles appear across roles but without documented responsibility for team technical direction, architectural decisions, or cross-team alignment at the required seniority
